content.text:
[cron:memory-sync-github 记忆同步GitHub] 请执行记忆同步任务：
1. 将 /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/MEMORY.md 复制到 /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/memory-repo/MEMORY.md
2. 将 /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/memory/full-history.md 复制到 /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/memory-repo/full-history.md
3. 将 SOUL.md、IDENTITY.md、USER.md、AGENTS.md 也复制过去
4. cd /root/.openclaw/workspace-main/memory-repo && git add -A && git commit -m '🧠 记忆同步' && git push origin main
5. 直接执行，不需要回复用户。完成后回复 NO_REPLY
